Variables.Name: AlignedPointsDistance
Variables.Description: Distance between each point of the same angle

Variables.Name: ConeDegrees
Variables.Description: Maximum degrees of the generated cone

Variables.Name: AngleStep
Variables.Description:
The step of the angle increase. Angle step must be >=1
	   Smaller values generate less items

Variables.Name: CenterActor
Variables.Description: The actor (or actors) that will generate a cone in their facing direction

Variables.Name: bIncludeContextLocation
Variables.Description:
Whether to include CenterActors' locations when generating items. 
	 	Note that this option skips the MinAngledPointsDistance parameter.
